data.title: Arizona's Caliber real estate firm's stock soars with launch of first publicly traded Chainlink Treasury.
data.description: Caliber, a real estate asset management firm located in Arizona, has made history by becoming the inaugural publicly traded company to initiate a Chainlink (LINK) treasury.

data.title: North American Air Compressor Rental Market reached $1.8 billion in 2024, expected to hit $2.6 billion by 2031.
data.description: A report on the 2025 North American Air Compressor Rental Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market saw a revenue of close to $1.8 billion in 2024, driven by increased infrastructure investment, equipment delays, and high demand in industrial sectors. It is anticipated to reach $2.6 billion by 2031. The market witnessed substantial growth in 2024 compared to previous years.

data.title: US labor market under strain as continuing unemployment claims hit highest since Nov. 2021, at 1,972,000. Search interest up.
data.description: The United States labor market is under significant strain, experiencing its most challenging conditions in almost four years. The number of Americans receiving unemployment benefits has risen to its highest level since November 2021, reaching 1,972,000 during the week ending August 9. This marks an increase of 30,000 from the previous week and is the highest level recorded since November 2021 when it stood at 2,041,000. Interest in "unemployment benefits" has also surged to multi-month highs, reflecting the official data that is now being scrutinized more frequently. The continuing claims figure tracks individuals who have previously filed for jobless benefits, remain unemployed for at least a week, and then reapply.

data.title: SoCalGas board declares quarterly dividends for preferred stocks: $0.375 per share for Preferred Stock and Series A.
data.description: On August 28, 2025, the board of directors at Southern California Gas Company (SoCalGas) announced the declaration of regular quarterly dividends for the company's preferred series stock. The dividends have been set at $0.375 per share for the SoCalGas Preferred Stock and the Preferred Stock, Series A. This decision indicates the company's commitment to providing returns to its shareholders.

data.title: Credo stock hits record high before earnings report; maker of high-speed gear for data centers to report fiscal Q1 results.
data.description: The stock of Credo, a manufacturer of high-speed connectivity equipment for data centers, surged to an all-time high in anticipation of its fiscal Q1 earnings report. The company is set to reveal its financial results soon. This development was highlighted in an article titled "Credo Stock Notches Record High Ahead Of Earnings Report" from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Fed Chair Powell turns dovish due to cooling labor market, hinting at rate cuts if slowdown continues. Job growth plummeted to 35,000 per month.
data.description: During his speech at Jackson Hole, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell surprised many by adopting a dovish stance, expressing concerns about escalating risks to the U.S. labor market. Powell indicated that if the economic slowdown worsens, monetary policy adjustments may be necessary, a departure from the previous wait-and-see approach. The focus has shifted from inflation to vulnerabilities in jobs and growth dynamics. Powell acknowledged the potential for rapid increases in layoffs and unemployment if employment risks materialize. Notably, job growth has slowed to 35,000 per month over the last three months, emphasizing the gravity of the situation compared to Powell's previous emphasis on inflation concerns.

Set to open in late September, the new Huajiang Canyon Bridge in China's Guizhou Province is on track to become the world's highest bridge. The four-lane suspension bridge, which rises 625 meters above the Beipan River, recently passed a five-day load test to confirm its safety

data.title: Chainlink partners with US Commerce Department to deliver economic data on-chain for smart contracts, including six BEA metrics, available on ten blockchains.
data.description: Chainlink recently revealed a partnership with the U.S. Department of Commerce to provide official macroeconomic data from the Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA) on-chain. This collaboration will allow smart contracts and decentralized applications to access trusted government statistics like GDP and inflation data. Chainlink's Data Feeds will offer six BEA metrics such as real GDP levels, quarter-over-quarter GDP growth rates, the Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) Price Index, and Real Final Sales to Private Domestic Purchasers. These datasets are accessible on ten blockchains, including Ethereum and Arbitrum.

data.title: Verizon CEO to speak at BofA Securities Conference on Sept 3, 2025, at 8:00 am ET. Webcast available on Verizon IR website.
data.description: On August 28, 2025, Sowmyanarayan Sampath, the Executive Vice President of Verizon (NYSE, Nasdaq: VZ) and CEO of Verizon Consumer, is set to address the BofA Securities 2025 Media, Communications & Entertainment Conference on September 3 at 8:00 a.m. ET. The event will be webcasted, and access details can be found on Verizon's Investor Relations website at www.verizon.com/about/investors.

data.title: Alibaba's stock trading lower ahead of earnings report. Focus on AI push and food-delivery competition.
data.description: Shares of Alibaba experienced a decline in trading on Thursday as anticipation builds for the release of the Chinese tech company's earnings report the following morning. Investors are closely monitoring the upcoming earnings report, particularly amidst Alibaba's focus on advancing artificial intelligence technology and facing increasing competition in the food delivery sector.

data.title: Nasdaq up, Lumentum soars 60% in 2025. Burlington breaks out. Nvidia bullish despite losses.
data.description: Nasdaq showed a moderate increase in gains, leading the market upwards. Nvidia successfully reduced its losses in a bullish manner, while Pure Storage experienced a breakaway gap. Notably, Lumentum soared, marking an impressive 60% increase in the year 2025. Burlington also saw a breakout, and Nvidia was slightly down during live coverage of the stock market events.

data.title: 3Si Security Systems introduces DirectToDispatch™, sending crime data directly to police dispatch in real time for safer responses.
data.description: 3Si Security Systems, based in Malvern, Pennsylvania, has introduced a pioneering technology known as DirectToDispatch™ (DTD). This innovative solution aims to provide real-time transmission of verified crime intelligence, such as video and audio directly from the source to police dispatch. DTD is an extension of the company's GPS Tracking Solution that has successfully delivered authenticated crime data to law enforcement agencies. This advancement is designed to support law enforcement by enhancing their access to critical information.

data.title: Cryptocurrency trading sideways, Bitcoin $112,688.81, Ethereum $4,490.69, 99,861 traders liquidated for $295.92M.
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets are currently stable as investors await new inflation data this Friday. The current prices for select cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin (BTC) at $112,688.81, Ethereum (ETH) at $4,490.69, Solana (SOL) at $211.53, XRP at $2.98, Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.2227, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.00001256.Recent statistics reveal that 99,861 traders were liquidated in the past day, totaling $295.92 million in losses. Data from SoSoValue indicates that there were net inflows of $81.3 million into spot Bitcoin ETFs on Wednesday, while spot Ethereum ETFs received net inflows of $309.5 million.In the last 24 hours, the top performers in the market include Pyth Network (PYTH), Cronos (CRO), and Conflux (CFX). Additionally, a recent report highlights the vulnerabilities of Bitcoin and Ethereum as their high liquidity levels reach all-time highs. Tom Lee from Fundstrat suggests Ethereum has a "50% chance" of surpassing Bitcoin. Stay informed on the developing story at Benzinga.com.

data.title: Visit Savannah partners with LoveShackFancy to launch a limited-edition capsule collection at Saks Fifth Avenue in New York City.
data.description: In Savannah, Georgia, Visit Savannah has announced a new collaboration with LoveShackFancy, launching a special capsule collection sold exclusively at Saks Fifth Avenue, a prominent luxury retailer. This unique partnership highlights the similar aesthetics of style, sophistication, and exploration that characterize both the cherished Southern city and the renowned luxury shopping brand. The collaboration premiered at a private media event at L'Avenue at Saks, where three distinct...

data.title: USound's MEMS speaker powers QCY MeloBuds N70, setting new audio standard. USound technology in mainstream market.
data.description: In Graz, Austria, USound unveiled its MEMS (Micro-Electro-Mechanical Systems) speaker technology incorporated into the QCY MeloBuds N70 earbuds. The introduction signals the integration of MEMS speakers in consumer audio, offering high-resolution, distortion-free sound. The QCY MeloBuds N70 features QCY’s DualCore Acoustic System, which merges a ring-shaped dynamic driver with the USound MEMS speaker, emphasizing innovation in audio technology for mainstream usage.

data.title: Long-term U.S. treasuries drop after Fed shake-up, 30-year Treasury yield rises 5 basis points to 4.94%. Bond ETFs in focus. TLT, EDV, ZROZ vulnerable.
data.description: On Tuesday, the removal of Federal Reserve Gov. Lisa Cook by President Donald Trump led to a decrease in long-term U.S. treasuries, causing uncertainty about the central bank's independence and monetary policy direction. The 30-year Treasury yield rose by up to five basis points to reach 4.94%. Attention has now shifted to Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) that monitor long-term government debt, with a particular focus on TLT amid Trump's actions against the Fed. Key ETFs affected include the iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF (TLT), the Vanguard Extended Duration Treasury ETF (EDV), and the PIMCO 25+ Year Zero Coupon U.S. Treasury Index ETF (ZROZ). These ETFs are highly susceptible to significant price changes when yields go up. TLT, a pivotal bond investment indicator for retail and institutional investors, typically decreases when long-term rates rise. Keep track of its live prices for the latest updates.
